clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Identify masked hypertension in adults with normal office BP readings
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Adults with untreated office SBP <130 mm Hg and DBP <80 mm Hg
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Exclude masked hypertension using out-of-office BP monitoring

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point for masked hypertension screening
Input office SBP and DBP readings
Verify SBP <130 and DBP <80, untreated status
Show COR 2b | LOE B-NR with rationale

rules: Check if office SBP <130 AND DBP <80 AND patient is untreated adult
If yes → consider out-of-office BP monitoring
Apply LOE B-NR: Moderate-quality evidence from nonrandomized studies
Recommendation: It may be reasonable to exclude masked hypertension
Monitoring options: Ambulatory BP monitoring (ABPM) or Home BP monitoring (HBPM)
If out-of-office BP is elevated despite normal office readings → suspect masked hypertension

categories.name: Normal Office + Elevated Out-of-Office
categories.action: Masked hypertension suspected → confirm with repeat monitoring

corLoeMapping.phrasing: May/Might be reasonable / May/Might be considered
corLoeMapping.evidenceSource: 1 or more nonrandomized studies, observational studies, or registry studies

recommendation.description: In adults with untreated office SBP <130 mm Hg and DBP <80 mm Hg, it may be reasonable to exclude masked hypertension using out-of-office BP monitoring

thresholds.sbp: N/A - screening recommendation, not crisis management

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Consider out-of-office BP monitoring (ABPM or HBPM) for patients meeting criteria
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: If masked hypertension excluded, repeat screening annually or with new risk factors
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: If out-of-office BP elevated, confirm with second monitoring session within 1-2 weeks
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag patients with confirmed masked hypertension for treatment consideration
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log office BP, out-of-office BP results, and masked hypertension diagnosis status
